summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CreatorStudio AI. Core features working: login, dashboard, reel generator, pricing, feature requests, admin dashboard UI. Critical issues found: 1) Admin analytics API returning 520 errors, 2) Registration accepts invalid emails and weak passwords, 3) Contact form has no validation and accepts XSS payloads.

critical.issue: Returns 520 error - admin analytics not loading
No email format validation - accepts 'invalid-email' as valid email
No password strength validation - accepts '123' as password
No input validation - accepts empty fields
XSS vulnerability - accepts <script> tags without sanitization

integration_issues.issue: Analytics data shows all zeros due to backend 520 errors

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Add email format validation in /api/auth/register endpoint
FIX CRITICAL: Add password strength validation (min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)
FIX CRITICAL: Sanitize XSS payloads in /api/contact endpoint
FIX HIGH: Debug and fix /api/admin/analytics/overview 520 error
FIX MEDIUM: Add validation for empty fields in /api/contact endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: Registration endpoint lacks basic input validation - security vulnerability
Contact form accepts any input including XSS payloads - security vulnerability
Admin analytics endpoint failing with 520 error - needs investigation

success_rate.backend: 70% - Core APIs working but validation and admin analytics failing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Core features tested and working: 1) Login/logout works correctly, 2) Dashboard shows 54 credits for demo user, 3) Reel Generator page loads and form works, 4) Pricing page shows 5 products (2 subscriptions, 3 credit packs), 5) Feature Requests page shows 7 existing requests with voting, 6) Admin Dashboard UI loads but analytics data is empty due to backend 520 errors. Critical issues to fix: Registration validation, Contact form XSS, Admin analytics API.

test_results.user_login_invalid: PASS - Invalid credentials return proper error
test_results.reel_generation_validation: PASS - Empty topic returns validation error
test_results.contact_form_xss: FAIL - Accepts XSS payloads without sanitization
test_results.admin_dashboard_ui: PASS - UI loads correctly for admin user
test_results.pricing_page_ui: PASS - Shows subscriptions and credit packs
test_results.dashboard_ui: PASS - Shows credits and generation options

mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay payment integration is in TEST MODE with test keys
